channel.title: Ethipoia on Hart Hoover
channel.description: Recent content in Ethipoia on Hart Hoover

item.title: Ethiopia Natural - First Ascent
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: My sister-in-law went skiing recently in the small mountain town of Crested Butte, CO. I’m always on the hunt for coffee I can’t normally get, so I did a little research (read: I googled it) and found First Ascent Coffee Roasters. First Ascent only roasts in small batches, claiming a laser-focus on high quality. My sister-in-law brought back two of their coffees: the Ethiopian coffee I’m drinking now and one from Columbia.

item.title: Ethiopia Guji Suke Quto - Blue Bottle
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: This month’s Blue Bottle shipment features “Ethiopia Guji Suke Quto”, described by Blue Bottle here: The 68-member Suke Quto producer’s association is located in the Odo Shakiso district, in Ethiopia’s Guji zone. Founded in 2004, Suke Quto stretches across a verdant 291 hectares and includes a diverse array of indigenous plant and animal species. After being hand-picked at its apex of ripeness, this coffee is fermented in concrete tanks, washed, and sun-dried on raised beds.
